properties.description:
检测短时间内来自同一IP的大量连接失败，表明存在暴力破解攻击。对应MDC告警: Suspected brute force attack (SQL.MySQL_BruteForce)。默认阈值为5分钟窗口内超过10次失败。
通过CONNECT事件无对应DISCONNECT来识别失败连接(Azure China的Status字段为空)。
MITRE ATT&CK Tactic: PreAttack
Severity: Medium
properties.body:
let TimeWindow = 5m;
let FailureThreshold = 10;
let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId !in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| summarize
    FailedAttempts = count(),
    DistinctUsers = dcount(User),
    AttemptedUsers = make_set(User, 10),
    StartTime = min(TimeGenerated),
    EndTime = max(TimeGenerated)
    by SourceIP = Ip, ResourceName, bin(TimeGenerated, TimeWindow)
| where FailedAttempts > FailureThreshold
| extend Severity = case(
    FailedAttempts > 100, "High",
    FailedAttempts > 50, "Medium",
    "Low")
| project StartTime, EndTime, SourceIP, ResourceName, FailedAttempts, DistinctUsers, AttemptedUsers, Severity
| order by FailedAttempts desc

properties.displayName: MySQL - Suspected Successful Brute Force Attack
properties.description:
检测在大量连接失败后出现成功登录的行为，表明暴力破解攻击可能已成功。对应MDC告警: Suspected successful brute force attack (SQL.MySQL_BruteForce)。
MITRE ATT&CK Tactic: PreAttack
Severity: High
properties.body:
let TimeWindow = 15m;
let FailureThreshold = 10;
let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
let FailedConnections = MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId !in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| summarize
    FailedAttempts = count(),
    FailStartTime = min(TimeGenerated),
    FailEndTime = max(TimeGenerated)
    by SourceIP = Ip, TargetUser = User, ResourceName, bin(TimeGenerated, TimeWindow)
| where FailedAttempts > FailureThreshold;
let SuccessfulConnections = MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| project SuccessTime = TimeGenerated, SourceIP = Ip, TargetUser = User, ResourceName;
FailedConnections
| join kind=inner (SuccessfulConnections) on SourceIP, TargetUser, ResourceName
| where SuccessTime between (FailStartTime .. (FailEndTime + 5m))
| project FailStartTime, FailEndTime, SuccessTime, SourceIP, TargetUser, ResourceName, FailedAttempts
| order by SuccessTime desc

properties.displayName: MySQL - Brute Force Attack Using Valid User
properties.description:
检测使用有效用户名(有成功登录历史)进行的暴力破解攻击。对应MDC告警: Suspected brute force attack using a valid user (SQL.MySQL_BruteForce)。
MITRE ATT&CK Tactic: PreAttack
Severity: Medium
properties.body:
let TimeWindow = 5m;
let FailureThreshold = 10;
let LookbackPeriod = 7d;
let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
let ValidUsers = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackPeriod)
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions)
| distinct User;
MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId !in (DisconnectedSessions)
| where User in (ValidUsers)
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| summarize
    FailedAttempts = count(),
    DistinctSourceIPs = dcount(Ip),
    SourceIPs = make_set(Ip, 10),
    StartTime = min(TimeGenerated),
    EndTime = max(TimeGenerated)
    by TargetUser = User, ResourceName, bin(TimeGenerated, TimeWindow)
| where FailedAttempts > FailureThreshold
| project StartTime, EndTime, TargetUser, ResourceName, FailedAttempts, DistinctSourceIPs, SourceIPs
| order by FailedAttempts desc

properties.displayName: MySQL - Login from Principal User Not Seen in 60 Days
properties.description:
检测60天内未见过的用户账号突然登录数据库。对应MDC告警: Login from a principal user not seen in 60 days (SQL.MySQL_PrincipalAnomaly)。
MITRE ATT&CK Tactic: Exploitation
Severity: Low
properties.body:
let LookbackPeriod = 60d;
let RecentWindow = 1d;
let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
let KnownUsers = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(LookbackPeriod) .. ago(RecentWindow))
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| distinct User, ResourceName;
let RecentLogins = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(RecentWindow)
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| summarize
    LoginCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    SourceIPs = make_set(Ip, 10)
    by UnseenUser = User, ResourceName;
RecentLogins
| join kind=leftanti (KnownUsers) on $left.UnseenUser == $right.User, $left.ResourceName == $right.ResourceName
| project FirstSeen, LastSeen, UnseenUser, ResourceName, LoginCount, SourceIPs
| order by FirstSeen desc

properties.displayName: MySQL - Login from Domain/IP Not Seen in 60 Days
properties.description:
检测来自60天内未见过的IP地址段的登录行为。对应MDC告警: Login from a domain not seen in 60 days (SQL.MySQL_DomainAnomaly)。
MITRE ATT&CK Tactic: Exploitation
Severity: Medium
properties.body:
let LookbackPeriod = 60d;
let RecentWindow = 1d;
let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
let KnownSubnets = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(LookbackPeriod) .. ago(RecentWindow))
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend Subnet = strcat_array(array_slice(split(Ip, "."), 0, 2), ".")
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| distinct Subnet, ResourceName;
MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(RecentWindow)
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend Subnet = strcat_array(array_slice(split(Ip, "."), 0, 2), ".")
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| summarize
    LoginCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    Users = make_set(User, 10),
    FullIPs = make_set(Ip, 10)
    by NewSubnet = Subnet, ResourceName
| join kind=leftanti (KnownSubnets) on $left.NewSubnet == $right.Subnet, $left.ResourceName == $right.ResourceName
| project FirstSeen, LastSeen, NewSubnet, ResourceName, LoginCount, Users, FullIPs
| order by FirstSeen desc

properties.displayName: MySQL - Login from Unusual Location (New IP Anomaly)
properties.description:
检测来自异常IP地址的登录。通过建立30天IP基线，识别从未见过的源IP登录。对应MDC告警: Log on from an unusual location / unusual Azure Data Center / unusual cloud provider (SQL.MySQL_GeoAnomaly / SQL.MySQL_DataCenterAnomaly / SQL.MySQL_CloudProviderAnomaly)。
MITRE ATT&CK Tactic: Exploitation
Severity: Medium
properties.body:
let LookbackPeriod = 30d;
let RecentWindow = 1d;
let MinHistoricalLogins = 5;
let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
let IPBaseline = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(LookbackPeriod) .. ago(RecentWindow))
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| summarize HistoricalCount = count() by Ip, ResourceName
| where HistoricalCount >= MinHistoricalLogins;
let RecentLogins = MySqlAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(RecentWindow)
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| where ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions)
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| summarize
    LoginCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    Users = make_set(User, 10)
    by NewSourceIP = Ip, ResourceName;
RecentLogins
| join kind=leftanti (IPBaseline) on $left.NewSourceIP == $right.Ip, $left.ResourceName == $right.ResourceName
| project FirstSeen, LastSeen, NewSourceIP, ResourceName, LoginCount, Users
| order by LoginCount desc

properties.description:
检测可疑的DDL操作，如DROP TABLE、TRUNCATE TABLE、DROP DATABASE等高危操作。此为MDC之外的增强规则，用于监控数据库结构变更中的潜在恶意行为。
MITRE ATT&CK Tactic: Impact
Severity: Medium
properties.body:
MySqlAuditLogs
| where isnotempty(SqlText)
| where SqlText has_any ("DROP TABLE", "DROP DATABASE", "TRUNCATE TABLE", "DROP INDEX", "ALTER TABLE")
| where SqlText !has "CREATE"
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| extend DDLType = case(
    SqlText has "DROP DATABASE", "DROP DATABASE",
    SqlText has "DROP TABLE", "DROP TABLE",
    SqlText has "TRUNCATE", "TRUNCATE TABLE",
    SqlText has "DROP INDEX", "DROP INDEX",
    SqlText has "ALTER TABLE", "ALTER TABLE",
    "Other DDL")
| extend Severity = case(
    SqlText has "DROP DATABASE", "High",
    SqlText has "TRUNCATE", "High",
    "Medium")
| project TimeGenerated, User, SourceIP = Ip, ResourceName, DDLType, SQLStatement = substring(SqlText, 0, 200), Severity
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description:
检测可疑的权限变更操作，如GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES、创建/删除用户等。此为MDC之外的增强规则，用于监控数据库权限变更中的潜在恶意行为。
MITRE ATT&CK Tactic: Persistence
Severity: Medium
properties.body:
MySqlAuditLogs
| where isnotempty(SqlText)
| where SqlText has_any ("GRANT", "REVOKE", "CREATE USER", "DROP USER", "ALTER USER")
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| extend DCLType = case(
    SqlText has "GRANT ALL", "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES",
    SqlText has "GRANT" and SqlText has "SUPER", "GRANT SUPER PRIVILEGE",
    SqlText has "CREATE USER", "CREATE USER",
    SqlText has "DROP USER", "DROP USER",
    SqlText has "ALTER USER", "ALTER USER",
    SqlText has "REVOKE", "REVOKE PRIVILEGE",
    SqlText has "GRANT", "GRANT PRIVILEGE",
    "Other DCL")
| extend Severity = case(
    SqlText has "GRANT ALL", "High",
    SqlText has "SUPER", "High",
    SqlText has "DROP USER", "High",
    SqlText has "CREATE USER", "Medium",
    "Low")
| project TimeGenerated, User, SourceIP = Ip, ResourceName, DCLType, SQLStatement = substring(SqlText, 0, 200), Severity
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description:
检测审计日志中包含常见SQL注入模式的查询，如UNION SELECT、OR 1=1、时间盲注(SLEEP/BENCHMARK)、文件读写(LOAD_FILE/INTO OUTFILE)等。此为MDC之外的增强规则。
MITRE ATT&CK Tactic: InitialAccess
Severity: High
properties.body:
MySqlAuditLogs
| where isnotempty(SqlText)
| where SqlText matches regex @"(?i)(union\s+(all\s+)?select|;\s*(drop|delete|update|insert|alter)\s|or\s+1\s*=\s*1|'\s*or\s*'|--\s*$|/\*.*\*/|char\s*\(|concat\s*\(.*select|load_file\s*\(|into\s+outfile|into\s+dumpfile|benchmark\s*\(|sleep\s*\(\s*\d)"
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| extend InjectionType = case(
    SqlText matches regex @"(?i)union\s+(all\s+)?select", "UNION-based Injection",
    SqlText matches regex @"(?i)or\s+1\s*=\s*1", "Boolean-based Injection",
    SqlText matches regex @"(?i)(sleep|benchmark)\s*\(", "Time-based Injection",
    SqlText matches regex @"(?i)(load_file|into\s+outfile|into\s+dumpfile)", "File-based Injection",
    SqlText matches regex @"(?i);\s*(drop|delete|update|insert|alter)\s", "Stacked Query Injection",
    "Other Injection Pattern")
| project TimeGenerated, User, SourceIP = Ip, ResourceName, InjectionType, SQLStatement = substring(SqlText, 0, 500)
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description:
当MySQL数据库连接失败率超过30%且总连接数大于10时触发，可能指示服务异常或持续的暴力破解攻击。
MITRE ATT&CK Tactic: PreAttack
Severity: Medium
properties.body:
let FailureRateThreshold = 30.0;
let DisconnectedSessions = MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "DISCONNECT"
| distinct ConnectionId;
MySqlAuditLogs
| where EventSubclass == "CONNECT"
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[-1])
| extend IsSuccess = iff(ConnectionId in (DisconnectedSessions), 1, 0)
| summarize
    TotalConnections = count(),
    SuccessfulConnections = countif(IsSuccess == 1),
    FailedConnections = countif(IsSuccess == 0),
    DistinctFailedIPs = dcountif(Ip, IsSuccess == 0),
    FailedUsers = make_set_if(User, IsSuccess == 0, 10),
    FailedIPs = make_set_if(Ip, IsSuccess == 0, 10)
    by ResourceName
| extend FailureRate = round(todouble(FailedConnections) / todouble(TotalConnections) * 100, 2)
| where FailureRate > FailureRateThreshold and TotalConnections > 10
| project ResourceName, TotalConnections, SuccessfulConnections, FailedConnections, FailureRate, DistinctFailedIPs, FailedUsers, FailedIPs
| order by FailureRate desc
